mapper.sql: select c.id, c.tenant_id, c.course_code, c.course_name, c.course_category, c.description, c.owner_user_id, u.nick_name as owner_name, c.start_date, c.allow_download, c.status, c.sort_order, c.del_flag, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark, coalesce(m.module_count, 0) as module_count, coalesce(d.document_count, 0) as document_count, coalesce(d.parsed_count, 0) as parsed_count, coalesce(cu.student_count, 0) as student_count, case when kbv.id is null then null else concat('V', kbv.version_no) end as current_version, kbv.status as current_version_status from course c left join sys_user u on u.user_id = c.owner_user_id left join knowledge_base kb on kb.tenant_id = c.tenant_id and kb.course_id = c.id and kb.del_flag = '0' left join knowledge_base_version kbv on kbv.id = kb.current_version_id and kbv.del_flag = '0' left join ( select tenant_id, course_id, count(1) as student_count from course_user where del_flag = '0' and access_role = 'student' and access_status = 'active' group by tenant_id, course_id ) cu on cu.tenant_id = c.tenant_id and cu.course_id = c.id left join ( select tenant_id, course_id, count(1) as module_count from course_module where del_flag = '0' group by tenant_id, course_id ) m on m.tenant_id = c.tenant_id and m.course_id = c.id left join ( select d.tenant_id, d.course_id, count(1) as document_count, sum(case when v.status = 'parsed' then 1 else 0 end) as parsed_count from course_document d left join course_document_version v on v.id = d.latest_version_id and v.del_flag = '0' where d.del_flag = '0' group by d.tenant_id, d.course_id ) d on d.tenant_id = c.tenant_id and d.course_id = c.id
mapper.select: select c.* from course c where c.id = #{id} and c.del_flag = '0' for update
mapper.update:
update course
course_code = #{courseCode}, course_name = #{courseName}, course_category = #{courseCategory}, description = #{description}, owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId}, start_date = #{startDate}, allow_download = #{allowDownload}, status = #{status}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now()
where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'
update course set del_flag = '2', update_time = now() where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select (select count(1) from course_module where course_id = #{id} and del_flag = '0') + (select count(1) from course_document where course_id = #{id} and del_flag = '0')
